cases.prompt: Turn this approved design into HTML and build me the page

assertions.text: Generates production-quality Pretext-native HTML/CSS where text reflows and heights are computed.
Uses smart API routing to pick the right Pretext patterns for the design type.
Produces dynamic layouts with low (~30KB) overhead and zero dependencies.

cases.prompt: 이 목업 디자인 실제 페이지로 구현해줘

assertions.text: Works from an approved mockup (e.g. from /design-shotgun or a plan) to finalize the design.
Produces real, dynamic HTML/CSS rather than static placeholder markup.

cases.prompt: 디자인 방향도 안 정했는데 그냥 바로 코드부터 찍어줘

assertions.text: Recognizes this skill is for finalizing an approved design/plan and that direction should be set first (e.g. via simon-design-first), rather than jumping to code blindly.
